<tool_call>{"name": "add_content_after_line", "arguments": {"file_path": "src/sds.c", "line_number": 830, "content": "
/* Reverse the sds string 's' in-place. */
sds sdsreverse(sds s) {
    size_t len = sdslen(s);
    if (len <= 1) return s;
    size_t i = 0, j = len - 1;
    while (i < j) {
        char tmp = s[i];
        s[i] = s[j];
        s[j] = tmp;
        i++;
        j--;
    }
    return s;
}
"}}</tool_call>
